backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, chart analysis storage/retrieval, user settings, and Gemini API key management, with role-based access control via AccessControl mixin and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to their affected files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering Gemini API URL configuration, request format, and error handling improvements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short natural-language summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of pages, components, hooks, and services in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Advance Signal Pro', mounting the React root at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in ThemeProvider and a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using the `useCamera` hook that handles starting/stopping the camera, capturing photos, switching cameras on mobile, and displaying Portuguese-localized error messages.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance level lines and a directional trend arrow on top of the uploaded chart image retrieved from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop file upload component that validates image files (PNG, JPG, WebP, max 10MB), rejects HEIC/HEIF formats with a warning, and calls an `onFileSelect` callback with the chosen file.
Renders a clickable card for a past chart analysis entry, displaying the signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, and trend direction, then navigates to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a full-screen container, renders child routes via `<Outlet>`, and includes a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link and a toast notifier.
Displays a single step in a multi-stage processing indicator, showing a spinner when active, a checkmark when complete, or an idle dot otherwise.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal card with direction icon, signal label (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, trend direction badge, trend strength, and optional score badge.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Provides utility functions to build the Gemini Vision API URL with an API key query parameter, return required headers, and validate the stored API key format via the backend actor.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context that manages light/dark theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the resulting `File` object and any permission error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, Gemini API key, and daily operation progress.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries, exposing a unified interface for reading and updating user settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens and base styles for typography, buttons, and range inputs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a trading chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using useGetAnalyses, showing a loading state or an empty-state prompt when no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Displays a multi-stage processing animation while loading a chart image from sessionStorage, validating the Gemini API key, and running chart analysis via the backend actor. Handles errors including missing API keys and 404s, then navigates to the results page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the analysis results page by reading parsed analysis data from sessionStorage, displaying the trading signal, confidence, trend, detected patterns, and chart overlay, with share and save actions.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing authenticated users to configure their Gemini API key, AI sensitivity, default timeframe, notifications, and daily operation limit, with theme toggling and Internet Identity login support.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Service that preprocesses chart images (validates format, resizes if over 4MB) and sends them to the Gemini Vision API as base64-encoded JSON payloads, returning a structured analysis response or throwing typed AnalysisApiError on failure.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response (ApiAnalysisResponse) including signal, trend, confidence, patterns, and explanation fields, along with a generic ApiError type.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps the external Gemini API analysis response to the internal AnalysisResult format, converting signal strings to AnalysisDirection enums, pattern strings to CandlestickPattern enums, and generating mock resistance levels.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility that formats an analysis result into a shareable text string and uses the Web Share API or clipboard fallback to share or copy it.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state document describing Advance Signal Pro, a mobile financial chart analysis app using Gemini Vision API, including architecture notes, known issues, and a registry of existing features.
